## Hardware verification

> Because this controls live audio hardware, please state how you tested.

- **Console model tested against:** <!-- X32 / M32 / WING / could not test -->
- **How I verified:** <!-- e.g. Inspector on a spare channel, confirmed fader moved to expected dB -->
- [ ] I tested any new/changed `set_*` tool against a **non-critical channel**, not a live bus.
- [ ] Any tool I could not verify against hardware is labeled `[UNVERIFIED]`.

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` compiles with no new errors
- [ ] The diff is focused on a single logical change
- [ ] I updated the README / docs if behavior changed
